concerns.text: T007 (Create base models/entities) must precede T004 (Setup SQLite database schema) — schema definition depends on entity models being defined first. Current order violates producer-before-consumer dependency.

T023 [P] (JaCoText model integration) is marked parallel-safe but depends on T011 (JaCoText gap resolution) being complete. T024 [P] (StarCoder model integration) similarly depends on T012. These [P] tags are incorrect — hidden ordering requirement exists.

T044 (CSV dataset loading) must precede T037-T041 (statistical tests) — tests cannot run without data loader. Current Phase 5 ordering places T044 after statistical test tasks, violating data-flow dependency.

T032 (quality metric aggregation) must come after T028-T031 (individual quality metrics) — aggregation consumes the metric outputs. Current ordering within Phase 4 does not reflect this producer-consumer relationship.

T042-T043 (sensitivity analysis) must come after T037-T041 (statistical tests) — sensitivity analysis consumes test results. Current ordering places sensitivity tasks before statistical tests complete.

Phase 3-5 user stories are documented as independently testable, but US2 depends on US1 (T019 code submission) and US3 depends on US2 (T032 metric aggregation). This contradicts the 'independently-shippable unit' requirement for user story groups.
